name: Brad's Straw House
description: A straw house built from locally sourced, hand-bundled golden straw. Brad considers it sustainable and carbon-negative. Destroyed by Kevin in one breath.

name: Piglet Pines Community Center
description: Community center where Brad gave a TEDx talk about his straw house. Located in Piglet Pines.

name: Terence's Timber House
description: A house built from architectural-grade timber curated from six old-growth forests. Features interlocking tongue-and-groove joinery, white oak posts, cedar shingle roof, and reclaimed pine floors. Contains display cases for Terence's stick 'expressions.' Destroyed by Kevin in one breath.

name: Susan's Brick House
description: A brick house with twelve-inch walls on a poured continuous concrete foundation, through-bolted to a steel frame Susan welded herself. Built to exceed residential code. Features rebar on twelve-inch centers, Portland cement mortar mixed for compressive strength, and a garden shed in the yard. Withstands all of Kevin's attempts to destroy it.
